title: The Evolution of On-Chain Credit Markets - DeFi Today Devconnect ARG
description:
This panel was held during DeFi Today at Devconnect ARG.

Panelists:
Merlin Egalite, Co-Founder of Morpho.
Rahul Goyal, Head of Institutional Partnerships at Gauntlet.
Marcin Kazmiercza, Co-Founder of RedStone and Credora.

Moderated by Ben Rodriguez, Protocol Specialist at Coinbase.
